title: scaffold-inventory.json
description: Catalogs existing libraries the project should reuse rather than reimplement. Produced by scaffold-audit in Phase 0.

id.description: Stable identifier. Referenced from modules.json's uses_scaffold[].

path.description: Filesystem path (host-side) OR git URL where the scaffold lives.

purpose.description: What this scaffold provides. One-sentence operator-readable.

status.description: tested: validated and ready to depend on. untested: present but not validated. test-rig-only: was used to test something else and isn't a library you'd ship. needs-fixes: requires patches before depending on.

known_issues.description: Bugs / limitations the scaffold-audit role found. Module-builders see these in their UPSTREAM_ARTIFACTS.

version.description: Version pin if applicable (e.g. git SHA, semver tag).
